ogTitle: One Tree Hill vs Oodla Wirra: Climate Safety

heading: One Tree Hill vs Oodla Wirra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between One Tree Hill, South Australia and Oodla Wirra, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: One Tree Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Oodla Wirra (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is One Tree Hill or Oodla Wirra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: One Tree Hill has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Oodla Wirra scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: One Tree Hill scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Oodla Wirra scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in One Tree Hill or Oodla Wirra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. One Tree Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
